Dicu 1. Pham vi va doi tuong dieu chinh
1. Quy che nay quy dinh ve cong lac van thir cua Truong Dai hoc GTVT.  Cong 
tac van thu duoc quy djnh trong quy che nay bao gom: Soan thao, ky ban hanh van 
ban; quan iy van ban; lap ho so va giao nop ho so, tai lieu vao Luu tru co quan; quan 
ly va su dung con dau; thiet bi luu khoa bi mat trong cong tac van thu.
2. Quy che duoc ap dung thong nhat doi voi cac don vi, to chuc trong toan
Ni
Truong.
Dieu 2. Giai thich tu* ngiT
1. Quy che cong tac van thu cua Truong Dai hoc Giao thong van tai bao gom tat 
ca nhung quy djnh ve boat dong van thu trong qua trinh quan ly, chi dao, dieu hanh 
ciia Nha truong de thuc hien chuc nang, nhiem vu ciia minh.
2. “Van ban" la thong tin thanh van duoc truyen dat bang ngon ngu hoac ky hieu, 
hinh thanh trong boat dong cua cac co quan, to chuc va duoc trinh bay dung the thuc, 
ky thuat theo quy djnh.
3. “Van ban chuyen nganh" la van ban hinh thanh trong qua trinh thuc hien boat 
dong chuyen mon, nghiep vu cua mot nganh. ITnh vuc do ngubi dung dau co quan 
quan ly nganh, ITnh vuc quy dinh.
4. “Van ban hanh chinh" la van ban hinh thanh trong qua trinh chi dao. dieu 
hanh, giai quyet cong vice cua cac co quan, to chuc.
5. ’’Van ban dien tu" la van ban duoi dang thong diep du- lieu duoc tao lap hoac 
dupe so hoa tu van ban giay va trinh bay dung the’thuc, ky thuat. djnh dang theo quy 
djnh.
6. “Van ban di" la tat ca cac loai van ban do co quan. to chuc ban hanh.
7. “Van ban den" la tat ca cac loai van ban do co quan, to chuc nhan dupe tu co 
quan to chuc. ca nhan khac gui den.
2


8. ‘'Ban thao van ban" la ban dirge viet hoac danh may hoac tao lap bang phirang 
tien dien tu hinh thanh trong qua trinh scan thao mot van ban cua co quan, to chuc.
9. ‘“Ban goc van ban" la ban hoan chinh ve noi dung, the thuc van ban, dirge 
ngiroi co tham quyen tme tiep ky tren van ban giay hoac ky so tren van ban dien tir.
If f • A AA» A
10. "Ban chinh van ban giay" la ban hoan chinh ve noi dung, the thuc van ban. 
dirge tao tir ban co chir ky true tiep ciia ngiroi co tham quyen.
11. ‘'Ban sao y" la ban sao day du, chinh xac noi dung ciia ban goc hoac ban 
chinh van ban, dirge trinh bay theo the thuc va ky thuat quy dinh.
12. “Ban sao luc“ la ban sao day du, chinh xac noi dung cua ban sao y. dirge trinh 
bay theo the thuc va ky thuat quy dinh.
13. "Ban trich sao" la ban sao chinh xac phan noi dung cua ban goc hoac phan 
noi dung ciia ban chinh van ban can trich sao. dugc trinh bay theo the thuc va ky thuat 
quy dinh.
i
14. "Danh muc ho so-" la bang ke co he thong nhung ho so du kien dugc lap 
trong nam ciia co quan, to chuc.
X • X A A A
15. "Ho so” la tap hgp cac van ban, tai lieu co lien quan voi nhau ve mot van de, 
mot sir vice, mot doi tugng cu the hoac co dac diem chung, hinh thanh trong qua trinh 
theo doi, giai quyet cong vice thuoc pham vi. chuc nang. nhiem vu cua co quan, to 
chuc, ca nhan.
16. “L4p ho so" la viec tap hgp. sap xep van ban. tai lieu hinh thanh trong qua 
trinh theo doi. giai quyet cong viec ciia co quan. to chuc. ca nhan theo nhung nguyen 
tac va phuong phap nhat dinh.
17. “He th6ng quan ly tai lieu dien tu” la He thong thong tin dugc xay dung voi 
chuc nang chinh de thuc hien viec tin hgc hoa cong tac soan thao, ban hanh van ban; 
quan ly van ban; hap ho so va nop luu ho so, tai lieu vao Luu tru co quan tren moi 
iruong inang (sau day ggi chung la He thong).
18. "Van thu co quan" la bo phan thuc hien mot so nhiem vu cong tac van thu 
ciia co quan, to chuc.
Bieu 3. Nguyen tac, yen can quan ly cong tac van thu
1. Nguyen tac
Cong lac van thu dugc thuc hien thong nhat theo quy dinh ciia phap luat.
2. Yeu cau
a) Van ban ciia Nha truong phai dugc soan thao va ban hanh diing tharn quyen, 
trinh tu. thu tuc, hinh thuc. the thuc va ky thuat trinh bay theo quy djnh ciia phap luat.
3


b) Tal ca van ban di, van ban den cua Truong Dai hoc Giao thong van lai phai
•» r
dugc quan ly tap trung tai Van thu Trudng (sau day goi la Van thu) de lam thii tuc tiep 
nhan, dang ky, tru nhung loai van ban dirge dang ky rieng theo quy dinh cua phap luat.
c) Van ban di, van ban den thuoc ngay nao phai dirge dang ky, phat hanh hoac 
chuyen giao trong ngay, chain nhat la trong ngay lam viec tiep theo. Van ban den co 
cac mire do khan: “Hoa toe'’, “Thugng khan“ va “Khan” (sau day goi chung la van ban 
khan) phai dugc dang ky, trinh va chuyen giao ngay sau khi nhan dugc.
d) Van ban phai dugc theo doi, cap nhat trang thai gui, nhan. xu ly.
d) Ngudi dugc giao giai quyet, theo doi cong viec cua ca quan. to chuc co trach 
nhiem lap ho so ve cong viec dugc giao va nop luu ho so. tai lieu vao Luu trir co quan.
e) Con dau, thiet bi luu khoa bi mat cua Trudng phai dugc quan ly, sir dung theo 
quy djnh cua phap luat.
g) He thong phai dap ung cac quy dinh tai Phu luc VI  Quy che nay va cac quy 
djnh cua phap luat co lien quan.
Dieu 4. Gia trj phap ly ciia van ban dien tir
1. Van ban dien tu dugc ky so bdi ngudi co tham quyen va ky so cua co quan, to 
chuc theo quy dinh cua phap luat co gia trj phap ly nhu ban goc van ban giay.
2. Chu ky so tren van ban dien tu phai dap ung day dii cac quy djnh cua phap
luat.
Dieu 5. Trach nhiem ciia co’ quan, to chuc, ca nhan doi voi cong tac van thu

cong lac van thu theo dung quy dinh hien hanh ciia Nha nude va ciia Trudng. dung 
chuc nang, tham quyen ciia don vi.
2. Can bd, vien chuc va lao dong hgp dong (sau day goi tat la can bd. vien chuc) 
thude Trudng trong qua trinh giai quyet cong vice dugc giao phai thuc hien nghiem 
tuc Quy che va quy djnh phap luat ve cong tac van thu.
3. Van thu co quan cd nhiem vu
a) Dang ky. thuc hien thu tuc phat hanh, chuyen phat va theo doi viec chuyen

b) Tiep nhan, dang ky van ban den: trinh. chuyen giao van ban den.

Dieu 7. Cac loai van ban hanh chinh
Van ban hanh chinh do Truong Dai hoc Giao thong van tai ban hanh gom: Quyet 
djnh (ca biet), quy che, quy djnh, hubng dan, chuong trinh, ke hoach, phuong an, de 
an, du an, bao cao, bien ban, to trinh, hop dong, cong van, ban ghi nho, ban cam ket, 
ban thoa thuan, giay chung nhan, giay uy quyen. giay moi, giay gidi thieu, giay nghi 
phep. giay di dubng.
Dieu 8. The thuc van ban
1. Tte thuc van ban la tap hop cac thanh phan cau thanh van ban, bao gom nhung
X r * \ n
thanh phan chinh ap dung doi vdi tat ca cac loai van ban va cac thanh phan bo sung 
trong nhung truong hop cu the hoac doi voi mot so loai van ban nhat djnh.
2. The thuc van ban hanh chinh bao gom cac thanh phan chinh
a) Quoc hieu va Tien ngu.
b) Ten co quan. to chuc ban hanh van ban.
c) So, ky hieu ciia van ban.
d) Dja danh va thbi gian ban hanh van ban.

d) Ten loai va tn'ch yeu noi dung van ban.
e) Npi dung van ban.
g) Chuc vu, ho ten va chu ky cua ngirdi co tham quyen.
h) Dau? chu ky so cua co quan, to chuc.
i) Noi nhan.
3. Ngoai cac thanh phan quy djnh tai khoan 2  Dieu nay, van ban co the bo sung 
cac thanh phan khac
a) Phu luc.
b) Dau chi do mat, muc do khan, cac chi dan ve pham vi luu hanh.
c) Ky hieu ngudi soan thao van ban va so luong ban phat hanh.

che nay.
Dieu 9. Ky thuat trinh bay van ban
* ■* f O B X
Ky thuat trinh bay van ban bao gom: Kho giay, kieu trinh bay, djnh le trang. 
phong chu, cd chu, kieu chu, vi tri trinh bay cac thanh phan the thuc, so trang van ban. 
Ky thuat trinh bay van ban hanh chinh duoc thuc hien theo quy dinh tai Phu luc I. Viet 
hoa trong van ban hanh chinh duoc thuc hien theo quy dinh tai Phu luc II. Chu1 viet tat 
ten loai van ban hanh chinh dupe thuc hien theo quy dinh tai Phu luc III.

Dieu 10. Soan thao van ban
1. Can cu tinh chat, noi dung cua van ban can soan thao, Hieu trudng giao cho 
mot don vj hoac ca nhan chii tri soan thao van ban (sau day goi tat la don vj chu tri 
soan thao).
Cac van ban co su dung tieng nude ngoai phai co ban tieng Viet kem theo, co 
kilm soat cua Phong Hop tac qu6c t4 va NCPT  va phai dupe su dong y cua Hieu 
trudng.
2. Don vj hoac ca nhan dupe giao chu tri soan thao van ban thuc hien cac cong 
viec: Xac djnh ten loai, npi dung va dp mat, muc dp khan cua van ban can soan thao;

thu thap, xu ly thong tin cd lien quan; soan thao van ban dung hinh thuc, the thuc va 
ky thuat trinh bay.
